downstream_consumers: Any code that imports types from the 14 consumer files above may be indirectly affected if type signatures change

risks.title: Schema incompatibility — Map-based vs ExportedGraph
risks.mitigation: Read pipeline/graph-builder.ts exports before each migration. Introduce adapter shims where full type replacement is not tractable within one phase.

risks.title: Compilation breaks in dependent tests
risks.mitigation: Run tsc --noEmit after each phase's batch of migrations. Fix test import updates before proceeding to next phase.

risks.title: Runtime behavior change from schema differences
risks.mitigation: Run vitest full suite after each phase. Pay special attention to RAG pipeline consumers (chunk-converter, indexing-orchestrator) which have integration tests.

risks.title: Some consumers may need the legacy DependencyGraph type indefinitely
risks.mitigation: If a consumer cannot be migrated, extract the needed type interface to a shared shim rather than keeping the legacy import. Document in decisions_log.

decision_records.decision: Phase 1 migrates low-complexity single-import consumers first
decision_records.rationale: fuzzy-resolver.ts, ai-prompt-generator.ts, query-executor.ts each import only GraphNode — smallest blast radius, build confidence before tackling multi-type consumers.
answer-generation-service, chunk-converter, graph-reranker, incremental-indexer, semantic-search import DependencyGraph type-only — likely replaceable with ExportedGraph or a targeted shim.

decision_records.decision: Phase 3 migrates high-complexity consumers (context layer + export + RAG orchestrator)
decision_records.rationale: impact-simulator, multi-hop-traversal, graph-exporter, indexing-orchestrator all import DependencyGraph + GraphNode + GraphEdge and use them structurally — require deeper adaptation.

decision_records.decision: Phase 4 deletes src/analyzer/graph-builder.ts after all imports cleared + tests pass
decision_records.rationale: Deletion is the final acceptance criterion. Do not delete until tsc --noEmit and vitest both pass cleanly.
